title: lichen-link: link_layer.rs build_frame expect() should return Result
description: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs:215 uses expect('buffer too small'). If caller provides undersized buffer, this panics. Should return Result<usize, BufferTooSmall> instead.
close_reason: Changed build_frame return type from usize to Result<usize, FrameError>, updated callers
